goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment
Make sure you get postcode and entrance fee
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should include free wifi
Make sure you get postcode and address
